title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BSC Academy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BSC Academy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
